name: Venison Hamburger Rice Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground venison, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine venison, bread crumbs, green pepper, onion, and 1/2 can tomato sauce in a large pie shell.
2. Mix rice, cheese, salt, and pepper with the remaining 1/2 can of tomato sauce.
3. Place the mixture on top of the first layer and spread evenly.
4. Pour the second half of the tomato sauce over the top.
5. Bake in a pie pan at 375°F for about 35 minutes.
